questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = 'e172fc5a-d4c4-418b-b623-fb33fe9808ad' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = 'cdd087ef-7ab6-4f43-a3d4-822b76c95652'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = 'e172fc5a-d4c4-418b-b623-fb33fe9808ad'; delete from question_items where id = 'e172fc5a-d4c4-418b-b623-fb33fe9808ad';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
